design_philosophy: Warm, authentic, vibrant, and slightly luxurious. Blending the deep roots of the Amazon with the elegant dining culture of Lisbon. We prioritize generous spacing, rich textures, and editorial typography.

header.style: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-[#FFF6E5]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#0B3D2E]/10. Sticky top with z-50.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B3D2E] text-[#FFF6E5] hover:bg-[#0B3D2E]/90 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-[#D4A017] text-[#0B3D2E] hover:bg-[#D4A017]/90 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#0B3D2E] text-[#0B3D2E] hover:bg-[#0B3D2E] hover:text-[#FFF6E5] transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold

cards.menu_highlight: Relative group overflow-hidden rounded-2xl. Image scales up on hover. Gradient overlay from bottom (black/80 to transparent). Text anchored at bottom.
cards.review_card: bg-white border border-[#0B3D2E]/10 p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm. Lora italic for the review text. Gold stars.

hero.background: Use 'tacaca_soup' image as a full cover background. Apply a parallax effect if possible. Overlay with bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0B3D2E]/90 via-[#0B3D2E]/60 to-transparent.
hero.content: Left-aligned inside container. Subtitle: 'Savor the Amazon in Lisbon' in gold accent. H1: 'Top Brasil Grill' or similar brand punch. CTA buttons to Menu and Reservations.

about.visual: Use 'restaurant_interior' image. Add an elegant rounded-t-full mask or a subtle offset border.
about.text: Heading: 'A Taste of Pará in the Heart of Lisbon'. Body: Lora font, rich storytelling about authentic ingredients.

menu_highlights.layout: Tetris Grid (Bento) using 4 images (Tacaca, Manicoba, Acai, Coxinha).
items: Tacacá: col-span-12 md:col-span-8 row-span-2 (Large Hero card)

full_digital_menu.layout: Text-based elegant list below highlights. Grouped by categories (Starters, Mains, Desserts). Use dotted leaders connecting dish name to price.
full_digital_menu.typography: Dish names in Montserrat bold, descriptions in Lora, Prices in Gold.

reviews.layout: Full width section with light muted background (#F5E8D3).
reviews.carousel: Use react-fast-marquee for a slow, continuous scroll of review cards.

reservations_ordering.layout: Wide banner container. Background uses 'hero_amazon_leaves' with dark green overlay.
reservations_ordering.content: Centered text in cream. Two large prominent buttons: 'Book via TheFork' (Primary) and 'Order via Uber Eats' (Secondary Gold).

location_contact.layout: 2-column grid. Left: Minimalist map placeholder/iframe. Right: Contact details (Address, Hours, Phone) using large typographic hierarchy.

footer.style: Dark background (#0B3D2E). Huge brand typography. Social links (IG, FB). Text in #FFF6E5.

animation_guidelines.scrolling: MUST use Lenis for smooth scrolling to provide a premium weight and momentum to the page.
animation_guidelines.hover_states: All buttons must translate slightly up (-translate-y-1) and have a subtle box-shadow increase.
animation_guidelines.reveal: Use framer-motion to slightly fade up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) text blocks and images as they enter the viewport.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white/cream text over images has a text-shadow or a dark gradient overlay behind it to meet 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All buttons, links, and forms MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='hero-reserve-button').
